PREFIX pq: <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/qualifier/>
PREFIX p: <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/>
PREFIX wd: <http://www.wikidata.org/entity/>
PREFIX rdfs: <http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
PREFIX ps: <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/statement/>
SELECT ?monarch ?monarchLabel ?duration WHERE {
  ?monarch p:P39 ?position .
  VALUES ?positionType {
    wd:Q18384454 wd:Q3439798
  }
  ?position ps:P39 ?positionType .
  ?position pq:P580 ?start .
  ?position pq:P582 ?end .
  BIND(xsd:integer(SUBSTR(STR(?start) , 1 , 4)) AS ?startYear)
  BIND(xsd:integer(SUBSTR(STR(?end) , 1 , 4)) AS ?endYear)
  BIND(?endYear - ?startYear AS ?duration)
  FILTER(?duration >= 30)
  OPTIONAL {
    ?monarch rdfs:label ?monarchLabel
    FILTER(LANG(?monarchLabel) = 'en')
  }
}
ORDER BY DESC(?duration)
